candidate_lesson: When the 30-indicator consensus shows conv=100% but green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0% (USDJPY LONG, AUDNZD LONG), the signal is a directional artifact with no historical precedent — treat conv=100%/hist_hr=0% pairs as UNRELIABLE and veto, regardless of indicator agreement.
testable_rule: if consensus_conv == 1.0 and consensus_hist_hr == 0.0 and green_matches == 0: return Veto('OOD_consensus_no_precedent')
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
